posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you ready to unleash the power of AI in automations?

Uncover how you take AI capabilities even further with new AI automation enhancements. In this community session, monday AI product managers @OrFrid and @Noa_F will share new features that you can use power up your monday.com automations.

Have any questions for the monday AI team? Ask below!

Check our our community calendar to keep up to date with upcoming events!

@ilanbu
